title: BottomTabBar — Four-Tab Persistent Navigation
problem: The app has four distinct areas (Sessions, Record, Clips, Band) that need to be reachable in one tap from anywhere in the app. Hierarchical-only navigation (back buttons) would require 3+ taps to switch from editing a clip to starting a new recording mid-jam.
analysis:
BottomTabBar renders four tabs fixed at the bottom of the viewport: Sessions (calendar icon), Record (mic icon), Clips (music-note icon), Band (users icon). 56px tall + safe-area-inset-bottom.

Active tab: amber text + icon, label visible. Inactive tabs: text-muted, label hidden on tight viewports.

Hiding rules:
- Tab bar hidden entirely on /edit routes (full-screen editor)
- Record tab hidden for MEMBER-role users (members cannot initiate recording)
- Clips tab hidden when no sessionId context (prevents duplicate tab pointing to same URL as Sessions)

Record tab accent ring pulses amber when a recording is actively in progress (detects via global recording state from Zustand).
successCriteria:
- Four tabs visible on all non-editor routes
- Active tab: amber icon + label
- Hidden on /bands/.../clips/.../edit routes
- Record tab hidden for MEMBER role
- Clips tab hidden when !sessionId
- Record tab shows pulsing amber ring when recording is active
- 44×56px touch target per tab
- Content never hidden behind tab bar (pb-[calc(56px+env(safe-area-inset-bottom))] on pages)
implementation: components/layout/BottomTabBar.tsx: client component. usePathname() to detect /edit routes + extract sessionId. useBandRole() hook for role check. useRecordingStore() for active-recording ring. Renders fixed bottom-0 flex-row nav with 4 items.

decisions.decision: Tab bar hidden during editor, not just partially visible
decisions.rationale: The timeline editor is near-full-screen — the waveform, cut list, and submit button need all available vertical space. A partial tab bar would either cover content or require the editor to shrink. Full hide keeps the editing surface clean.

knownLimitations: Clips tab disappears when navigating from session to band settings — the sessionId context is not preserved in the URL and is lost
Tab bar height is hardcoded at 56px — not responsive to font size settings
userGuide: The tab bar at the bottom of the screen lets you switch between Sessions, Record, Clips, and Band settings with a single tap from anywhere in the app.
